('Daily Water Consumption', 4, 'Billion Cubic Meters', 'Usage', true),

('Water Loss Prevention', 82, 'Percent', 'Efficiency', true),
('Desalination Capacity', 100, 'Million Cubic Meters', 'Technology', true),
('Smart Water Systems', 45000, 'Cities', 'Innovation', true),
('Water Quality Monitoring', 99.8, 'Percent', 'Quality', true),
('Renewable Water Energy', 16, 'Percent', 'Energy', true),
('Water Conservation Savings', 40, 'Percent', 'Conservation', true),
('Industrial Water Reuse', 55, 'Percent', 'Industry', true),
('Agricultural Water Efficiency', 70, 'Percent', 'Agriculture', true),
('Water Purification Technology', 99.99, 'Percent', 'Technology', true),
('Water Infrastructure Investment', 500, 'Billion USD', 'Investment', true),
('Water Research Projects', 2500, 'Projects', 'Research', true);
